meta.title: The Realignment - Ep. 3: Silicon Valley vs. D.C.
meta.description:
Open Markets Institute Fellow, Matt Stoller, and the Lincoln Network’s Head of Policy, Zach Graves, join The Realignment to discuss the origins of the populist backlash against Silicon Valley technology companies.

Subscribe to be notified about new episodes every week:

Spotify: https://spoti.fi/2Kb1kyz
Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast...
Google Podcasts: https://bit.ly/2Ox1d4o
Stitcher: https://bit.ly/2OAjqy9

Learn more about The Realignment at: https://www.hudson.org/
